zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cross於1580年7月25日出生在英國素福爾可武爾皮特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Cross32歲，母親Agnes Napper26歲。他於1603年6月29日與Rachel Anna Dising在英國薩默塞特哈林其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1640年9月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cross于1580年7月25日出生在英国素福爾可武爾皮特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Cross32岁，母亲Agnes Napper26岁。他于1603年6月29日与Rachel Anna Dising在英国薩默塞特哈林其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1640年9月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cross
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross, such as one set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, from Middle English cros (Old English cros and Old Norse kross, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem). It is commonly Latinized in medieval records as ad crucem and de Cruce but examples of this can just as well belong to the synonymous but less common name Crouch . In a few cases the surname may have been given originally to someone who lived by a crossroads, but this sense of the word seems to have been a comparatively late development. In other cases, the surname (and its European cognates; see 3 below) may have denoted someone who carried the cross in processions of the Christian Church, but in English at least the usual word for this sense was Crozier .
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cross’ or ‘the cross’, such as French Lacroix , German Kreutz , and Slovenian and Croatian Križ (see Kriz ).

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

variants.name: Croce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Carlo, Nicola, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Gino, Rocco, Saverio, Amadeo, Amerigo.

from croce ‘cross’ (from Latin crux, genitive crucis), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a roadside cross, or a nickname for someone who carried the cross in religious processions. Compare English Cross .

variants.name: Grose
meanings: Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived near a stone cross set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, Cornish crous (from Latin crux, crucis). Compare Cross .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gross  .

variants.name: Crosse
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cross  .

variants.name: Kreutz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Gottfried, Orlo, Reinhold.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross set up by the roadside, in a marketplace, or as a field or boundary marker, from Middle High German kriuz(e) ‘cross’. Compare Cross .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cross was born on 25 July 1580, in Woolpit, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Cross, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Napper, was 26. He married Rachel Anna Dising on 29 June 1603, in Charlinch, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 September 1640, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cross(이)가 1580년 7월 25일 영국 수폴크 보피에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Cross(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Napper(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1603년 6월 29일 영국 서머세트 찰린치에서 Rachel Anna Dising(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 9월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cross nasceu em 25 de julho de 1580, em Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Cross, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Napper, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel Anna Dising em 29 de junho de 1603, em Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1640, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cross родился 25 июля 1580 г. в местности вулпит, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Cross было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Napper, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Anna Dising 29 июня 1603 г. в местности чарлинч, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 сентября 1640 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет.

Se casó con Rachel Anna Dising el 29 de junio de 1603, en Charlinch, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1640, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años.
